CustomField.formula:
IF ( NOT(ISBLANK(First_Order_Date_Import__c)), First_Order_Date_Import__c,
IF (
OR( First_Order_Date_from_Children_Account__c < First_Order_Date_Opp_RollUp__c , ISBLANK(First_Order_Date_Opp_RollUp__c))
, First_Order_Date_from_Children_Account__c , First_Order_Date_Opp_RollUp__c ))
CustomField.label: First Order Date
